content.problemStatement:
You are given an array of integers. Your task is to traverse the array using a pointer and decrement the pointer to access the previous elements of the array.


Input Format
The first line contains an integer `n`, representing the size of the array.

The second line contains `n` space-separated integers, representing the elements of the array.



Output Format
Print the elements of the array in reverse order, each element on a new line, by decrementing the pointer from the last element to the first.
